content_en:
The People Of The First Generation, The Companions Of The Messenger of Allah #%, Are The Best Of This Nation.

Some Narrations Which Mention That A Large Number Of People From This nation Will Enter Paradise Without Reckoning ..

A Woman Might Have Been Married To More Than One Man During Her Lifetime; In Paradise,

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 21

Jn The Name Of Allah, The Most Beneficent, The Most Merciful.

O Allah, send prayers and salutations on Muhammad, his family, and his Companions. ‘This is the Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations. It deals with what the Prophet 2% informed us about regarding the signs of the Hour and the great events that are to take place before the Day of Judgment, all of which we must have faith in, because the Prophet # spoke not from desire, but from revelation.

Abu Moosa Al-Ash’aree related that the Messenger of Allah 2 said, “This nation of mine is one upon which there is mercy; there is no punishment upon it in the Hereafter; its punishment is in this world — with trials, earthquakes, and killings.”

Hitherto in our discussion on the unseen past/] we covered in detail events that pertain to the beginning of the world, the stories of the prophets, and the history of peoples until our era. Then we discussed the biography of the Prophet #é, mentioning his characteristics and the proofs of his prophethood. Then we covered some events that the Prophet #¢ prophesized about and that have already taken place before our century. When we gave an account of events that took place after the Prophet's death, we pointed out those occurrences about which a hadith gave information. Since we already mentioned those prophesies that have already become realized and since it. would be too long to repeat them all here, we will suffice by mentioning only a few examples, after which we will return to the main theme of this work. And we seek help from Allah #.

' This book is a continuation of Ibn Katheer’s history book, Al-Bidaayah Wan-Nihaayah; whereas the previous volumes are concerned with past events, this one is chiefly concerned with events that are yet to take place.

22 Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations

SOME OF THE EVENTS THAT THE PROPHET # SAID WOULD OCCUR AFTER HIS LIFETIME

The Prophet #¢ intimated that after him Abu Bakr would take charge over the Muslim Nation

In another narration, the Prophet # said, “And with those two who come after me, Abu Bakr and “Umar.” (Ahmad, Ibn Maajah, AtTirmidhee, who ruled it to be authentic). These words were proven to be true, for Abu Bakr .4 became Khaleefah after the Prophet # and he was then followed by ‘Umar #.

The Prophet #% Intimated To Us That The Muslims Would Conquer Egypt

Yon Ka’ab related from his father @ that the Messenger of Allah 2¢ said, “When you conquer Egypt, then treat its inhabitants in a good manner.” (Maalik) And in another narration, “Treat its inhabitants in a good manner, for they have the right of security and they are kinsfolk (Hagar, the mother of Ismaa’eel, was from them).” ‘Amr ibn Al-Aas 2 led the Muslim army that conquered Egypt in the year 20 H, during the caliphate of ‘Umar ibn Al-Khattaab . And Abu Dhar # related that the Prophet 2% said, “Indeed you will conquer a land in which Al-Qeeraat is mentioned (Al-Qeeraat is a portion of a dinar, dirham, and other currencies; the people of

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 23

Egypt, who used Al-Qeeraat in their transactions, would speak about it often). Treat its inhabitants well, for they have the right of security and they are kinsfolk.” (Muslim)

The Prophet #% Foretold The End Of The Persian And Roman Empires

The Messenger of Allah #¥ said, “When Caesar is destroyed, there will be no Caesar after him, and when Kisra {a title designated to the emperor of Persia) is destroyed, there will be no Kisra after him. And by the One Who has my soul in His Hand, you will spend their treasures in the way of Allah.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

The Messenger of Allah 4 Prophesized “Umar’s Murder

24 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

which will become agitated like the agitation of the sea (i.e. when people will become submersed in discord).’ I said, ‘O leader of the believers, indeed between it and you is a closed door.’ He said, ‘Woe unto you! Will the door be opened or will it break?’ I said, ‘Rather, it will break.’ He said, ‘Then it will never be closed again.’ I said, ‘Indeed.’ ”

Shafeeq Ibn Salamah said, “We said to Hudhaifah, ‘It is as if (Umar 4% knows who that door is?’’” Hudhaifah answered, “Yes, J related to him a hadith that was not false (not false because it was spoken by the Prophet #%, who spoke not from desire, but from revelation).” Shafeeg later said, “We were afraid to ask Hudhaifah who the door was, so we asked Masrooq to ask.” Hudhaifah a answered, “Umar.” And this is exactly what occurred. After ‘Umar 2 was killed in the year 23 H, people became engulfed in trials; ‘Umar’s death was what led to the spreading of those trials.

The Prophet #% Foretold The Trials That ‘Uthmaan .# Was To Undergo

The Prophet #¢ said that ‘Uthmaan Ibn ‘Affaan #& was from the inhabitants of Paradise but that he would first be afflicted by a trial. This happened when he was besieged in his own home. Throughout that trial until its culmination - when he was murdered - he was patient and was hoping for his reward from Allah #%, and he became a martyr. When we previously discussed the events surrounding ‘Uthmaan’s murder, we mentioned those Ahandeeth in which that murder was foretold by the Prophet 2%. Similarly, we mentioned those Ahaadeeth which foretold of the events that took place during the days of Jamal and Siffeen."] And we seek help from Allah 4%.

The Prophet 3 Foretold ‘Ammaar Ibn Yaasir‘s Killing

There are narrations in which the Prophet #¥ said that ‘Ammar 2 would be killed. As for the Khawaarij, whom ‘Alee Ibn Abee Taalib # fought, there are many ahaadeeth related about them, ahaadeeth

& Brom this point forward, when Imam Ibn Katheer - may Allah have mercy on him - says about a hadith or topic that he discussed it earlier, it might be from an earlier section of this volume, but he may be referring to what he wrote in a previous volume of his book on history.

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 25

we have hitherto mentioned - all praise is for Allah and all blessings are from Him. We have also discussed the murder of ‘Alee & and the ahaadeeth that foretold it.

The Prophet 2% Specified That The Period Of The Caliphate Was To Last For Thirty Years After His Death And Then The Era Of Kingdoms Would Begin

Safeenah “ reported that the Messenger of Allah ## said, “The Khilaafah (caliphate) after me will last for thirty years; then there will be kingdom(s).” (Ahmad, Abu Daawood, An-Nisaaee, and AtTitmidhee, who ruled it to be Hasan)

The Prophet # Gave Tidings Of Al-Hasan Making Peace Between Two Huge Groups Of Muslims
content_id:
Orang-Orang Dari Generasi Pertama, Para Sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ, Adalah Sebaik-Baik Umat Ini.

Beberapa Riwayat Yang Menyebutkan Bahwa Sejumlah Besar Orang Dari Umat Ini Akan Masuk Surga Tanpa Hisab ..

Seorang Wanita Mungkin Telah Menikah Dengan Lebih Dari Satu Pria Selama Hidupnya; Di Surga,

Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 21

Dengan Nama Allah, Yang Maha Pengasih, Maha Penyayang.

Ya Allah, limpahkanlah shalawat dan salam atas Muhammad, keluarganya, dan para Sahabatnya. Inilah Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar. Kitab ini membahas apa yang telah disampaikan oleh Nabi ﷺ kepada kita mengenai tanda-tanda hari Kiamat dan peristiwa-peristiwa besar yang akan terjadi sebelum Hari Pembalasan, yang semuanya wajib kita imani, karena Nabi ﷺ tidak berbicara dari hawa nafsu, melainkan dari wahyu.

Abu Moosa Al-Ash'aree meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Umatku ini adalah umat yang mendapat rahmat; tidak ada azab atasnya di akhirat; azabnya ada di dunia ini — dengan cobaan, gempa bumi, dan pembunuhan."

Hingga saat ini dalam pembahasan kita tentang masa lalu yang ghaib, kita telah membahas secara rinci peristiwa-peristiwa yang berkaitan dengan awal mula penciptaan dunia, kisah-kisah para nabi, dan sejarah umat-umat terdahulu hingga era kita. Kemudian kita membahas biografi Nabi ﷺ, menyebutkan sifat-sifatnya dan bukti-bukti kenabiannya. Lalu kita membahas beberapa peristiwa yang telah dinubuwatkan oleh Nabi ﷺ dan yang telah terjadi sebelum abad kita. Ketika kita memaparkan peristiwa-peristiwa yang terjadi setelah wafatnya Nabi, kita menunjukkan kejadian-kejadian yang telah dikabarkan oleh hadith. Karena kita telah menyebutkan nubuwat-nubuwat yang telah terbukti kebenarannya dan karena akan terlalu panjang untuk mengulang semuanya di sini, kita cukup menyebutkan beberapa contoh saja, setelah itu kita akan kembali ke tema utama karya ini. Dan kita memohon pertolongan kepada Allah ﷻ.

' Kitab ini adalah kelanjutan dari kitab sejarah Ibnu Katsir, Al-Bidaayah Wan-Nihaayah; sedangkan jilid-jilid sebelumnya membahas peristiwa-peristiwa masa lalu, kitab ini terutama membahas peristiwa-peristiwa yang belum terjadi.

22 Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

BEBERAPA PERISTIWA YANG DIKABARKAN OLEH NABI ﷺ AKAN TERJADI SETELAH MASA HIDUPNYA

Nabi ﷺ mengisyaratkan bahwa setelah beliau, Abu Bakr akan memimpin Umat Islam

Dalam riwayat lain, Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Dan bersama dua orang yang datang setelahku, Abu Bakr dan Umar." (Ahmad, Ibnu Maajah, At-Tirmidhee, yang menilainya shahih). Sabda ini terbukti benar, sebab Abu Bakr radhiyallahu 'anhu menjadi Khalifah setelah Nabi ﷺ dan kemudian diikuti oleh Umar radhiyallahu 'anhu.

Nabi ﷺ Mengisyaratkan Kepada Kita Bahwa Kaum Muslimin Akan Menaklukkan Mesir

Ibnu Ka'ab meriwayatkan dari ayahnya radhiyallahu 'anhu bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Apabila kamu menaklukkan Mesir, maka perlakukanlah penduduknya dengan baik." (Maalik) Dan dalam riwayat lain, "Perlakukanlah penduduknya dengan baik, karena mereka memiliki hak perlindungan dan mereka adalah kerabat (Hajar, ibunda Ismaa'eel, berasal dari mereka)." 'Amr ibn Al-Aas radhiyallahu 'anhu memimpin pasukan Muslim yang menaklukkan Mesir pada tahun 20 H, pada masa kekhalifahan Umar ibn Al-Khattaab radhiyallahu 'anhu. Dan Abu Dzar radhiyallahu 'anhu meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Sesungguhnya kamu akan menaklukkan suatu negeri di mana Al-Qeeraat disebutkan (Al-Qeeraat adalah bagian dari dinar, dirham, dan mata uang lainnya; penduduk

Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 23

Mesir, yang menggunakan Al-Qeeraat dalam transaksi mereka, sering membicarakannya). Perlakukanlah penduduknya dengan baik, karena mereka memiliki hak perlindungan dan mereka adalah kerabat." (Muslim)

Nabi ﷺ Meramalkan Berakhirnya Kekaisaran Persia dan Romawi

Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Apabila Caesar binasa, maka tidak akan ada Caesar setelahnya, dan apabila Kisra (gelar yang diberikan kepada kaisar Persia) binasa, maka tidak akan ada Kisra setelahnya. Dan demi Dzat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, kamu akan membelanjakan harta kekayaan mereka di jalan Allah." (Bukhaaree dan Muslim)

Rasulullah ﷺ Meramalkan Pembunuhan Umar

24 Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

yang akan bergejolak seperti gejolak lautan (yakni ketika manusia akan tenggelam dalam perselisihan).' Aku berkata, 'Wahai pemimpin kaum mukminin, sesungguhnya antara itu dan engkau terdapat sebuah pintu yang tertutup.' Ia berkata, 'Celakalah engkau! Apakah pintu itu akan dibuka atau akan hancur?' Aku berkata, 'Bahkan, ia akan hancur.' Ia berkata, 'Kalau begitu ia tidak akan pernah tertutup lagi.' Aku berkata, 'Benar.'"

Shafeeq Ibn Salamah berkata, "Kami berkata kepada Hudhaifah, 'Seolah-olah Umar radhiyallahu 'anhu tahu siapa pintu itu?'" Hudhaifah menjawab, "Ya, aku meriwayatkan kepadanya sebuah hadith yang tidak dusta (tidak dusta karena diucapkan oleh Nabi ﷺ, yang tidak berbicara dari hawa nafsu, melainkan dari wahyu)." Shafeeq kemudian berkata, "Kami segan untuk bertanya kepada Hudhaifah siapa pintu itu, maka kami meminta Masrooq untuk bertanya." Hudhaifah radhiyallahu 'anhu menjawab, "Umar." Dan inilah yang benar-benar terjadi. Setelah Umar radhiyallahu 'anhu dibunuh pada tahun 23 H, manusia diliputi berbagai fitnah; kematian Umar itulah yang menyebabkan meluasnya fitnah-fitnah tersebut.

Nabi ﷺ Meramalkan Cobaan-Cobaan Yang Akan Dialami Utsman radhiyallahu 'anhu

Nabi ﷺ bersabda bahwa Utsman Ibn Affaan radhiyallahu 'anhu termasuk penghuni surga namun ia akan terlebih dahulu ditimpa cobaan. Hal ini terjadi ketika ia dikepung di dalam rumahnya sendiri. Sepanjang cobaan itu hingga puncaknya — ketika ia dibunuh — ia bersabar dan mengharapkan pahala dari Allah ﷻ, dan ia menjadi seorang syahid. Ketika kita sebelumnya membahas peristiwa-peristiwa seputar pembunuhan Utsman, kita menyebutkan hadith-hadith yang meramalkan pembunuhan tersebut. Demikian pula, kita menyebutkan hadith-hadith yang meramalkan peristiwa-peristiwa yang terjadi pada masa Jamal dan Shiffeen. Dan kita memohon pertolongan kepada Allah ﷻ.

Nabi ﷺ Meramalkan Pembunuhan Ammaar Ibn Yaasir

Terdapat riwayat-riwayat di mana Nabi ﷺ bersabda bahwa Ammaar radhiyallahu 'anhu akan dibunuh. Adapun Khawaarij, yang diperangi oleh Ali Ibn Abi Thalib radhiyallahu 'anhu, terdapat banyak hadith yang diriwayatkan tentang mereka, hadith-hadith

& Mulai dari titik ini ke depan, ketika Imam Ibnu Katsir — semoga Allah merahmatinya — menyatakan tentang sebuah hadith atau topik bahwa ia telah membahasnya sebelumnya, mungkin itu berasal dari bagian sebelumnya dalam jilid ini, tetapi ia mungkin merujuk pada apa yang ia tulis dalam jilid sebelumnya dari kitab sejarahnya.

Kitab Al-Nihayah: Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 25

yang telah kita sebutkan sebelumnya — segala puji bagi Allah dan segala berkah berasal dari-Nya. Kita juga telah membahas pembunuhan Ali radhiyallahu 'anhu dan hadith-hadith yang meramalkannya.

Nabi ﷺ Menetapkan Bahwa Masa Kekhalifahan Akan Berlangsung Selama Tiga Puluh Tahun Setelah Wafatnya Dan Kemudian Era Kerajaan-Kerajaan Akan Dimulai

Safeenah radhiyallahu 'anhu meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Khilafah setelahku akan berlangsung selama tiga puluh tahun; kemudian akan ada kerajaan-kerajaan." (Ahmad, Abu Daawood, An-Nisaaee, dan At-Tirmidhee, yang menilainya Hasan)

Nabi ﷺ Memberikan Kabar Gembira Tentang Al-Hasan Yang Akan Mendamaikan Dua Kelompok Besar Kaum Muslimin
content_ar: The People Of The أولاً Generation, The الصحابة Of الرسول ﷺ of الله #%, Are The Best Of This Nation. Some Narrations Which Mention That A Large Number Of People From This nation Will Enter الجنة Without Reckoning .. A Woman Might Have Been Married To More Than One Man خلال Her Lifetime; In الجنة, الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 21 Jn The Name Of الله, The Most Beneficent, The Most Merciful. O الله, send الصلوات and salutations on محمد ﷺ, his الأسرة, and his الصحابة. ‘This is the الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations. It deals with what النبي ﷺ 2% informed us about فيما يخص the signs of the Hour and the great events that are to take place قبل the يوم القيامة, all of which علينا have الإيمان in, لأن النبي ﷺ # spoke not from desire, but from الوحي. Abu Moosa Al-Ash’aree related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 said, “This nation of mine is one upon which there is الرحمة; there is no العقاب upon it in الآخرة; its العقاب is in this الدنيا — with الابتلاءات, earthquakes, and killings.” Hitherto in our discussion on the unseen past/] we covered in detail events that pertain to the beginning of the الدنيا, the stories of the الأنبياء, and the history of peoples حتى our era. Then we discussed the biography of النبي ﷺ #é, mentioning his characteristics and the proofs of his prophethood. Then we covered some events that النبي ﷺ #¢ prophesized about and that have already taken place قبل our century. عندما we gave an account of events that took place بعد النبي ﷺ's الموت, we pointed out those occurrences about which a الحديث gave information. بما أن we already mentioned those prophesies that have already become realized and بما أن it. would be أيضاً long to repeat them all here, we will suffice by mentioning only a few examples, بعد which we will return to the الرئيسي theme of this work. And we seek help from الله #. ' This الكتاب is a continuation of Ibn Katheer’s history الكتاب, Al-Bidaayah Wan-Nihaayah; في حين the previous volumes are concerned with past events, this one is chiefly concerned with events that are yet to take place. 22 الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations SOME OF THE EVENTS THAT النبي ﷺ # SAID WOULD OCCUR بعد HIS LIFETIME النبي ﷺ #¢ intimated that بعد him أبو بكر would take charge over the مسلم Nation In another narration, النبي ﷺ # said, “And with those two who come بعد me, أبو بكر and “عمر.” (أحمد, Ibn Maajah, AtTirmidhee, who ruled it to be authentic). These words were proven to be true, for أبو بكر .4 became Khaleefah بعد النبي ﷺ # and he was then followed by ‘عمر #. النبي ﷺ #% Intimated To Us That The المسلمون Would Conquer Egypt Yon Ka’ab related from his الأب @ that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2¢ said, “عندما you conquer Egypt, then treat its inhabitants in a الخير manner.” (Maalik) And in another narration, “Treat its inhabitants in a الخير manner, for they have the الحق of security and they are kinsfolk (Hagar, the الأم of Ismaa’eel, was from them).” ‘Amr ibn Al-Aas 2 led the مسلم army that conquered Egypt in the year 20 H, خلال the الخلافة of ‘عمر ibn Al-Khattaab . And Abu Dhar # related that النبي ﷺ 2% said, “Indeed you will conquer a land in which Al-Qeeraat is mentioned (Al-Qeeraat is a portion of a dinar, dirham, and other currencies; the people of الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 23 Egypt, who used Al-Qeeraat in their transactions, would speak about it often). Treat its inhabitants well, for they have the الحق of security and they are kinsfolk.” (مسلم) النبي ﷺ #% Foretold The End Of The Persian And Roman Empires الرسول ﷺ of الله #¥ said, “عندما Caesar is destroyed, there will be no Caesar بعد him, and عندما Kisra {a title designated to the emperor of Persia) is destroyed, there will be no Kisra بعد him. And by the One Who has my النفس in His Hand, you will spend their treasures in the الطريق of الله.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) الرسول ﷺ of الله 4 Prophesized “عمر’s Murder 24 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations which will become agitated like the agitation of the sea (i.e. عندما people will become submersed in discord).’ I said, ‘O leader of the المؤمنون, indeed between it and you is a closed door.’ قال, ‘Woe unto you! Will the door be opened or will it break?’ I said, ‘Rather, it will break.’ قال, ‘Then it will never be closed again.’ I said, ‘Indeed.’ ” Shafeeq Ibn Salamah said, “We said to Hudhaifah, ‘It is as إذا (عمر 4% knows who that door is?’’” Hudhaifah answered, “Yes, J related to him a الحديث that was not false (not false لأن it was spoken by النبي ﷺ #%, who spoke not from desire, but from الوحي).” Shafeeg later said, “We were afraid to ask Hudhaifah who the door was, لذا we asked Masrooq to ask.” Hudhaifah a answered, “عمر.” And this is exactly what occurred. بعد ‘عمر 2 was killed in the year 23 H, people became engulfed in الابتلاءات; ‘عمر’s الموت was what led to the spreading of those الابتلاءات. النبي ﷺ #% Foretold The الابتلاءات That ‘Uthmaan .# Was To Undergo النبي ﷺ #¢ said that ‘Uthmaan Ibn ‘Affaan #& was from the inhabitants of الجنة but that he would أولاً be afflicted by a الابتلاء. This happened عندما he was besieged in his own home. Throughout that الابتلاء حتى its culmination - عندما he was murdered - he was patient and was hoping for his الأجر from الله #%, and he became a martyr. عندما we previously discussed the events surrounding ‘Uthmaan’s murder, we mentioned those Ahandeeth in which that murder wأماetold by النبي ﷺ 2%. Similarly, we mentioned those Ahaadeeth which foretold of the events that took place خلال the days of Jamal and Siffeen."] And we seek help from الله 4%. النبي ﷺ 3 Foretold ‘Ammaar Ibn Yaasir‘s Killing There are narrations in which النبي ﷺ #¥ said that ‘Ammar 2 would be killed. أما the Khawaarij, whom ‘Alee Ibn Abee Taalib # fought, there are many ahaadeeth related about them, ahaadeeth & Brom this point forward, عندما الإمام Ibn Katheer - may الله have الرحمة on him - says about a الحديث or topic that he discussed it earlier, it might be from an earlier الفصل of this volume, but he may be referring to what كتب in a previous volume of his الكتاب on history. الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 25 we have hitherto mentioned - all praise is for الله and all البركات are from Him. We have أيضاً discussed the murder of ‘Alee & and the ahaadeeth that foretold it. النبي ﷺ 2% Specified That The Period Of The الخلافة Was To Last For Thirty Years بعد His الموت And Then The Era Of Kingdoms Would Begin Safeenah “ reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله ## said, “The Khilaafah (الخلافة) بعد me will last for thirty years; then there will be kingdom(s).” (أحمد, Abu Daawood, An-Nisaaee, and AtTitmidhee, who ruled it to be حسن) النبي ﷺ # Gave Tidings Of Al-حسن Making Peace Between Two Huge Groups Of المسلمون
